prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this—really. That task isn't getting any easier by waiting, but *you* are getting stronger just by showing up. The hardest part is already behind you: deciding to do it. Now, just start—doesn't have to be perfect, just *done*. Five minutes in, you’ll wonder why you waited so long. Trust yourself. You’ve handled tough things before, and this is no different. Go crush it. 💪
